frontmatter.title: Challengica
frontmatter.description: A code-puzzle game we hosted at our college tech fest, where each riddle needs you to write code to solve it, and the answer unlocks the next challenge.
frontmatter.bannercaption: Every answer is only a few lines of code away, and it unlocks the next puzzle
